profile: Emma is a 35-year-old freelance graphic designer and single mother of a 7-year-old daughter. She works from home, juggling client projects with school runs and childcare. Her schedule is irregular - sometimes working late into the night to meet deadlines, other times taking afternoon breaks to pick up her daughter. Emma tries to maintain a yoga routine three times per week but often skips it when busy. She has a supportive network of other parents she connects with at school and occasional video calls with her sister abroad. Sleep is inconsistent, averaging 6 hours per night, and she relies on coffee throughout the day. Emma uses a smartwatch mainly to track steps and set reminders for picking up her daughter.

scenes.description:
I'm wrapping up work for the day.
Just finished that logo design for Smith & Co.
Now I need to make dinner for Sophie.
She's been asking for pasta all week.
I'll check if Sarah is free to pick her up from school tomorrow.
Hey, I'm making pasta for dinner, want to join us?
No, I'm good thanks, I'm on a video call with Rachel in a bit.
Okay, talk to you later then.
Love you, bye.
Sophie, how was your day?
It was good, we did a science project.
That sounds fun, I'm proud of you.
Can I watch TV now?
Yes, but just for an hour, it's getting late.

No, I'm good thanks, I'm on a video call with Rachel in a bit

scenes.description:
Okay it's 8 AM I should get Sophie up and ready for school.

  Sophie wake up sweetie it's time to get dressed.

  I'm coming mom.

  Don't forget we have a parent-teacher meeting today at 3 PM.

  I won't forget mom.

  Can you grab your backpack while I make some breakfast?

  I'm almost ready.

  Alright let's have some toast and then we'll head out.

  Can I have a banana too?

  Of course honey here you go.

  I need to check my schedule for the day.

  Okay so I have a deadline for that Johnson project on Monday.

  I'll make sure to work on it this weekend if needed.

I'm coming mom
Don't forget we have a parent-teacher meeting today at 3 PM
I won't forget mom
Hey just a heads up we have a PTA meeting today at 3 PM. See you then?
Reminder: Project deadline is Monday. Let us know if you have any concerns
Your recent project files have been reviewed. No issues found.
Morning! Just getting Sophie ready for school. Busy day ahead

scenes.description:
I'm taking a short break from work.
I'll do some yoga to clear my head.
Okay let's see if I can get into downward-facing dog.
Hmm my back is a bit tight today.
I'll just stretch for a bit then.
Maybe I'll call Rachel later and catch up.
We haven't talked in ages.
Should I make a cup of tea or coffee?
Decaf probably a better idea this late.
Okay tea it is then.

messages.content: Hey Rach, just taking a break from work. Should catch up soon?
Hey Em, how's it going? Just got out of a meeting. Want to grab coffee this week?
Hi Emma, just a quick update on the Smith project. We need the final design by Friday.
Hi Mia, just a heads up I'll be a bit late picking up Sophie today. Traffic is bad.
Subject: Miss you! When can we schedule a call?

scenes.description:
I'm on a video call with my sister now.
Hey sis how's it going?
Good good just got back from a walk.
I'm so jealous I need to get out more.
Yeah I know what you mean.
How's the weather there?
It's freezing.
Brrr I'm glad I'm here then.
So what's new with you?
Not much same old work.
You know how it is.
I'm trying to meet this deadline.
I'm sure you'll get it done.
You're always so busy with Sophie and work.
I try to balance it.
Do you have any fun plans for the weekend?
I was thinking of taking Sophie to the park.
That sounds like fun.
You should send me some pics.
Will do.
I should probably get going.
Sophie will be back soon from her friend's house.
Alright talk to you soon.

scenes.description:
I'm making breakfast for Sophie and me.

Pancakes or scrambled eggs what do you want sweetie?

Can I have pancakes mom?

Okay but just one or two we're having a light breakfast.

I'm on a call with Rachel from the PTA now.

Hey Rachel what's up?

Just organizing the bake sale for next week.

I'm in can I help with anything?

Actually yeah we could use someone to make cupcakes.

I'd love to do that when is it?

This Saturday morning.

Perfect Sophie and I can come by after breakfast.

Sounds great thanks Emma!
